title: Drithpack
description:
A modpack made for my friends and I, with no particular theme.
It revolves around 4 main mods: Cobblemon, Create, Farmers Delight, and Aether, with plenty of addons and QoL.
body:
A modpack made for my friends and I, with no particular theme. 

It revolves around 4 main mods: **Cobblemon, Create, Farmers Delight, and Aether**, with plenty of addons and QoL. It is heavily modeled after my own personal taste, only a few big content mods to keep the gameplay focused and not be overloaded by 10 different mods that all interact with each other.

I also tried to keep general gameplay immersive, using f.e. Antique Atlas 4 instead of Xeros Maps and enhanced Spyglass functionality instead of a basic zoom. It should feel like your character is doing things like looking at a map, not you the player.

**None of the mods included were made by me**, I only adjusted Config files and tested out if everything works together. The full modlist with credits is provided below, with links to sources outside of Modrinth:
